summary: { "project": "AI Evolution", "use_cases": [ { "id": "interactive_code_assistance", "name": "Interactive Code Assistance", "description": "User interacts with AI Chat to brainstorm and generate code snippets, which are then manually or semi-automatically integrated into the project.", "primary_components": ["AiChat", "LLM"], "workflow": [ "User opens AI Chat view.", "User provides a prompt for code generation.", "AI returns code.", "User reviews and copies code to workspace." ] }, { "id": "autonomous_agent_workflow", "name": "Autonomous Agentic Workflow", "description": "A set of agents (e.g., developer, reviewer) work together to complete a complex task without constant user intervention.", "primary_components": ["Agent", "Task", "LLM", "Orchestrator"],
